title: coix lacryma
intro: Coix lacryma, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of annual grass native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coix lacryma are attributed to its ability to support digestion, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Coix lacryma is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its herbal preparations can be found in various forms, including dried seeds and powder.
